pageContext.name: Berserk Deluxe Volume 11
pageContext.description: The adult horror manga against which all others are measured continues in another incredible deluxe oversized hardcover edition, the Berserk Deluxe Volume 11 Hardcover Book!  Guts the Black Swordsman and company prepare to leave the port of Vritannis, only to have their way blocked by an army of abominations led by a powerful Kushan sorcerer. Even Guts' accursed Berserker armor may not be enough to stem the bestial tide, especially when faced by the leviathan astral form of the malefic Kushan Emperor!   This Deluxe edition collects Berserk volumes 31-33, including three-fold-out color posters.  Enter the dark fantasy world of Berserk and add this Deluxe collection to your library today!
